policy.reason: The workspace is disk constrained. Historical binary continuation checkpoints and per-step probe receipts are not required to resume the current G1 run; compact JSON summaries and this manifest preserve the decision record.

checkpoint_write_gate.effect: Latest-only controller runs may promote every positive descent while pruning superseded generated checkpoints; retained working-tree restart evidence remains a single latest checkpoint.

cleanup_scope.deleted_checkpoint_pattern: implementation/phase1/release_evidence/productization/**/*_final_checkpoint.npz except current frontier, plus superseded non-final cleanup checkpoint mgt_shell_free_component_state_cleanup_frontier_checkpoint.npz

latest_only_followup201_248.superseded_generated_checkpoint_policy: pruned during or after latest-only continuation; controller summaries retain the audit trail.
latest_only_followup201_248.pruned_probe_receipt_policy: Per-step followup201-248 probe JSON/NPZ files were pruned after scalar extraction into the compact continuation summary and controller summaries.

latest_only_followup249_258.superseded_checkpoint_policy: followup248, component-FD followup249-250, and cached followup251-257 checkpoints are superseded by followup258; cached followup251-258 probe receipts are pruned after scalar extraction.

latest_only_followup259_274.superseded_checkpoint_policy: followup258 and cached followup259-273 checkpoints are superseded by followup274; cached followup259-274 probe receipts are pruned after scalar extraction.

latest_only_followup275_290.superseded_checkpoint_policy: followup274 and cached followup275-289 checkpoints are superseded by followup290; cached followup275-290 probe receipts are pruned after scalar extraction.

latest_only_followup291_306.superseded_checkpoint_policy: followup290 and cached followup291-305 checkpoints are superseded by followup306; cached followup291-306 probe receipts are pruned after scalar extraction.

latest_only_followup307_322.superseded_checkpoint_policy: followup306 and cached followup307-321 checkpoints are superseded by followup322; cached followup307-322 probe receipts are pruned after scalar extraction.

component_fd_hip_followup323_341.superseded_checkpoint_policy: followup322, component-FD followup323/324/333, and cached followup332 checkpoints are superseded by followup341; cached followup325-341 probe receipts and intermediate component probes are pruned after scalar extraction.

total_scaled_component_fd_hip_followup34.superseded_checkpoint_policy: followup341, component-FD followup344/353, and cached followup352 checkpoints are superseded by followup361; cached followup345-361 probe receipts and followup352 component probe are pruned after scalar extraction.

attached_equilibrium_newton_followup362_.superseded_checkpoint_policy: followup361 is superseded by attached-policy followup365; all-components followup363 checkpoint is pruned because it used the wrong load-path contract.

increment_rocm_lane_followup366.checkpoint_policy: No followup366 checkpoint retained because no residual descent was promoted.

full_load_path_followup367_369.checkpoint_policy: No all_components checkpoint retained because no gate-closed full-load frontier was produced.
